channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned bin leading to overflowing rubbish and fly tipping, 19th March
item.description:
A residential black bin has been left in this location for some months. It has led to rubbish being dumped around it. Please can the bin (not just the rubbish) be removed?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middleton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog faeces, 19th March
item.description:
Once again dog owners are using the area around the base of the beautiful tree that is outside our house at 109 Bouverie rd as a dog toilet. Please remove and put up signs.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bouverie Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smashed glass eveeywhere, 19th March
item.description:
Someone has smashed the glass at the shelter and it is all over the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Avenue, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - smashed glass or panels / jagged metal edges on shelter

item.title: Corner house maybe? Or first house, 19th March
item.description:
Over hanging low branches obstructing pedestrians turning from southlands road in to clarence road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clarence Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lights still out, 19th March
item.description:
1x NatWest 2x jd sports

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 148-154, High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture left on pavement, 19th March
item.description:
Furniture left on public pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middleton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner bush, 19th March
item.description:
Reply was that this was going to be removed in 2025. Every year its an issue and restricts movement in rush hour around that corner. Bush is now getting life back for spring and its back to square one.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southlands Grove, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missed green waste collection, 19th March
item.description:
The green waste ie. Brown bin was not collected on Tuesday this week. Tried to ring Lewisham Refuse collection but couldn’t get through. The bin was left at the edge of the driveway for collection but was ignored by the collection service.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colfe Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned sign, 19th March
item.description:
This sign has been lying there for weeks, seems to have been forgotten.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights

item.title: Near salt box, 19th March
item.description:
Someone has dumped on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Samos Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sheldon near Anson junction, 19th March
item.description:
Please sweep here!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anson Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car abandoned on public road for weeks, 19th March
item.description:
This car has not moved for over 3 weeks now, can you contact owner to park on their drive or appropriately rather than taking up 2 spaces as parking is already limited for those who live on the road, many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wallhouse Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car Charging across a pavement, 19th March
item.description:
There is a car charging cable and its protective cover across the pavement. The cover is about 2.5-3 inches high. It causes difficulty for prams, pushchairs, disability wheelchairs or scooters to pass comfortably. No answer from the house. It is not safe or secure practice to have such obstacles on an already narrow pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Como Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on the hoarding on Woodland Crescent, 19th March
item.description:
Great if you can paint over this and other graffiti on this hoarding. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mell Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on junction box on Trafalgar Road outside Bolton House, 19th March
item.description:
Great if you can paint over this. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trafalgar Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shop putting waste out not in timebands, 19th March
item.description:
Despite multiple letters to residents recently the shop is still putting their waste outside of their neighbours during the day It's bagged commercial waste that has been out since mid afternoon when it shouldn't be there until 8pm

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cardboard fly tipped, 19th March
item.description:
This has been here for the past month.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brodie Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish dumped by Plumstead Gardens, 19th March
item.description:
Several bags of rubbish dumped outside of Plumstead Gardens near the junction to Marmadon Road. Dumped overnight, thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeding/pressure cleaning needed all around Laird House and Kevan House, 19th March
item.description:
No one is weeding or clearing moss and weeds from the concrete areas around the tower blocks and it is now building up. When it is scraped, the debris is just left there and not bagged up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redcar Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Lime bike, 19th March
item.description:
Bike abandoned in Hardings Lane near corner with Parish Lane SE20. Bike ID: WXN-NTY

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hardings Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
